sections.name: Multiple Choice
sections.quote: Section I: Multiple Choice — Questions: 60 — Time: 1 Hour (60 minutes) — Exam Score: 50%. Approximately 30%–40% of the multiple-choice questions will reference stimulus material, including maps, tables, charts, graphs, images, infographics, and/or landscapes.

sections.name: Free Response
sections.quote: Section II: Free Response — Questions: 3 — Time: 1 Hour 15 Minutes (75 minutes) — Exam Score: 50%.
